rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §28.0064 governs early literacy reading interventions for students. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 28.0064. EARLY LITERACY INTERVENTION FOR CERTAIN STUDENTS.
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education statute.
